title: Login page error
description: Users are unable to log in due to a server authentication issue.

title: Update billing information
description: Customer requested to update credit card details for subscription.

title: Feature request for export
description: Customer wants the ability to export reports in CSV format.

title: Dashboard loading slowly
description: The analytics dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer reports not receiving password reset emails.

title: Mobile UI alignment issue
description: Buttons overlap on smaller mobile screens.

title: API integration support
description: Customer needs help integrating the API with their CRM.

title: Data sync failure
description: Automated data synchronization failed during nightly job.

title: Add dark mode option
description: Customer requested a dark theme for better usability at night.

title: Invoice generation bug
description: Generated invoices contain incorrect tax calculations.

title: Account suspension inquiry
description: Customer wants clarification on why their account was suspended.

title: Notification settings improvement
description: Customer wants granular control over email notifications.

title: Report download timeout
description: Large reports fail to download due to timeout issues.

title: Search functionality enhancement
description: Customer requested advanced filters in the search module.

title: User role permission bug
description: Admin users cannot assign roles to new team members.
